pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 58-69 (docker-compose service definition with container_name)
setup_task.sh lines 17-27 and 58-66 (server listens on port 3000 and compose maps 3000:3000)
setup_task.sh lines 17-24 (server GET / returns 'Hello from Docker!')

privileged_info_summary: Setup_task.sh procedurally creates the shadow-bug project at /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug with a Node.js server that listens on port 3000, responds with 'Hello from Docker!' at GET /, and is exposed by the shadow-app container defined in docker-compose.yml.
